name: Tim Burchett
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $155,858 for Tim Burchett in U.S. House, TN-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
